reports.summary: 飞书WebSocket连接异常断开 (keepalive ping timeout / no close frame)
reports.solution: 飞书服务端断开连接或keepalive超时，已自动重连。网络层问题，无需代码修复。
reports.representative_line: 2026-04-21 12:20:50,999 ERROR Lark: receive message loop exit, err: sent 1011 (internal error) keepalive ping timeout; no close frame received [conn_id=7631049095679855822]

reports.summary: 多个Gateway实例PID文件竞争导致退出
reports.solution: 这是用户操作问题——同时启动了多个gateway实例。需要用户手动管理进程，代码无需修改。
reports.representative_line: 2026-04-21 18:34:42,762 ERROR __main__: PID file race lost to another gateway instance. Exiting.

reports.summary: MCP tool minimax/understand_image 调用失败
reports.solution: 需要检查MCP server状态和网络连通性，可能是MCP服务未运行或连接问题。
reports.representative_line: 2026-04-21 23:09:31,219 ERROR [20260421_213319_0b5dbc95] tools.mcp_tool: MCP tool minimax/understand_image call failed:

reports.solution: 这是用户操作问题——另一个进程已占用8642端口。需要用户停止冲突进程或修改配置。
reports.representative_line: 2026-04-21 23:34:15,708 ERROR gateway.platforms.api_server: [Api_Server] Port 8642 already in use. Set a different port in config.yaml: platforms.api_server.port

reports.solution: 这是用户操作问题——已有gateway实例(PID 4716)在运行。需要用户先停止旧实例。
reports.representative_line: 2026-04-21 23:34:19,790 ERROR gateway.platforms.feishu: [Feishu] Another local Hermes gateway is already using this Feishu app_id (PID 4716). Stop the other gateway before starting a second Feishu websocket client.
